title: Northern Council Dining Area Panorama
description: Changes the menu panorama to a view of the Northern Council's dining area from the Unstable SMP.
body:
On the Unstable SMP, the Northern Council's dining area is seen at the beginning of Parrot's video, [ I Survived the Unstable SMP Purge](https://youtu.be/FW095YeIhmU). This resource pack turns the menu panorama into the Northern Council's dining area.

I used the map from [this video](https://youtu.be/npMWxjbSiDA) to make this panorama and I used [Panorama Screenshot](https://modrinth.com/project/K3RHGadZ) to take the screenshots and format them easily.

This resource pack is also included in my modpack, [Unstable SMP Recreation](https://modrinth.com/project/SU0WjsoL).
